brand_identity.name: AlumniConnect
brand_identity.mission: To create a joyful, fun-loving, and colorful extension of the college experience that bridges the gap between students and alumni through mentorship, career growth, and community.
brand_identity.tone: Professional yet Personal, Vibrant, Inclusive, Academic but Modern
brand_identity.archetype: Neo-Academic (Archetype 6: Vibrant Play mixed with Archetype 4: Swiss Clarity)

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and hero text. Letter-spacing tight.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and UI text. High legibility.

typography.font_loading_instruction: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,100..1000&family=Outfit:wght@100..900&display=swap');

primary.description: Deep Royal Blue - Represents Trust, Wisdom, and Academic Roots.

secondary.description: Vibrant Yellow - Represents Energy, Optimism, and the 'Colorful' vibe.

accent.description: Playful Pink - Used for gamification badges, 'Applaud' actions, and highlights.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital flatness (optional).

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) + Top Header (User Profile) + Main Content Area (Bento Grid)
dashboard.spacing: Gap-6 or Gap-8 between widgets. Padding-8 for container.
dashboard.responsive: Sidebar becomes bottom nav or hamburger menu on mobile.

profile_page.structure: Hero Banner (Top) + Floating Avatar + Two Column Layout (Left: Bio/Stats, Right: Activity/Timeline)
profile_page.grid_style: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) - Mix of tall, square, and wide cards.

landing_page.structure: Hero Section (Split or Center) + Feature Grid + Testimonials + Call to Action
landing_page.style: High impact, large typography, generous whitespace (py-20).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

badges.gamification: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-orange-500 text-white font-bold shadow-lg border-2 border-white

leaderboard.style: List view with medals for Top 3. Highlight current user rank at bottom sticky.

streaks.visual: Fire icon with counter. Animate on increase.

applaud.interaction: Button with 'Clap' icon. Confetti explosion effect on click.

charts_and_data.style: Clean, minimal axes. Rounded bar ends. Tooltips with glassmorphism.

universal_guidelines.interaction: All interactive elements must have hover/active states. No dead clicks.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for text. Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
universal_guidelines.testing: All critical elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-btn').
universal_guidelines.animation: Use framer-motion for page transitions and micro-interactions. Avoid 'transition: all'.
universal_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Form + Zod for validation. Show error messages clearly below inputs.
universal_guidelines.responsive: Mobile-first approach. Ensure touch targets are at least 44px.

instructions_to_main_agent:
1. Install 'lucide-react', 'recharts', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if not present.
2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sidebar/header structure for authenticated pages.
3. Use the 'Bio' content provided in the prompt for the seed data/placeholders.
4. Implement the 'Applaud' feature using a simple counter state with local storage for MVP.
5. For charts, create a 'StatsCard' component that wraps the chart with a title and summary metric.
6. Ensure the 'Admin' role has distinct visual cues (e.g., a badge or specific header color) to differentiate from Student/Alumni views.
